title: cordia viridis
intro: Cordia viridis, also known as the Green Manjack or Green Cordia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Buxaceae family, native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cordia viridis include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Cordia viridis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and bark are commonly used in herbal remedies.
